zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend John Shenton於1557年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀時，他的父親Peares Shenton27歲，母親Margaret Shaw26歲。他於1588年5月2日與Katherine Savile在英國萊希斯特斯爾布拉比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1609年7月30日在他的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾卡芙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend John Shenton于1557年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀时，他的父亲Peares Shenton27岁，母亲Margaret Shaw26岁。他于1588年5月2日与Katherine Savile在英国萊希斯特斯爾布拉比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1609年7月30日在他的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾卡芙特。

nameMeanings.name: Shenton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sheinton (Shropshire), Shenton (Leicestershire), or Shavington (Cheshire), recorded as Shenton in 1514. The Shropshire placename probably derives from Old English scēne ‘bright, beautiful’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or perhaps from an Old English personal name Scēna + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Leicestershire place takes its name from the river Sence, itself from Old English scenc ‘drink, draught’, + Old English tūn, while the Cheshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Scēafa + Old English connective -ing- + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend John Shenton was born in 1557, in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, his father, Peares Shenton, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Shaw, was 26. He married Katherine Savile on 2 May 1588, in Blaby, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 30 July 1609, in his hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Croft, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend John Shenton est né en 1557, à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Peares Shenton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Shaw, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Savile le 2 mai 1588, à Blaby, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 juillet 1609, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Croft, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reverend John Shenton 1557 in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peares Shenton 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Shaw 26. Er hat am 2. Mai 1588 in Blaby, Leicestershire, England Katherine Savile geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. Juli 1609 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Croft, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Shenton è nato il nel 1557 nel Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Peares Shenton, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Shaw, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Savile il 2 maggio 1588, nel Blaby, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 luglio 1609, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Croft, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend John Shentonが1557年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコテスバチで生まれた時，父Peares Shentonは27歳，母Margaret Shawは26歳であった。1588年5月2日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブラビーでKatherine Savileと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1609年7月30日に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアクロフトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend John Shenton(이)가 1557년 영국 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peares Shenton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Shaw(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1588년 5월 2일 영국 레이스스터실르 블라비에서 Katherine Savile(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1609년 7월 30일 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 크로프트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Shenton nasceu em 1557, em Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peares Shenton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Shaw, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Savile em 2 de maio de 1588, em Blaby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de julho de 1609, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Croft, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend John Shenton родился в 1557 г. в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peares Shenton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Shaw, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Savile 2 мая 1588 г. в местности блаби, лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 июля 1609 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности крофт, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend John Shenton nació en 1557, en Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peares Shenton, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margaret Shaw, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Katherine Savile el 2 de mayo de 1588, en Blaby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de julio de 1609, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Croft, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
